name: status-badge
title: Status Badge
author: mcpcn
description: Status badge with multiple states (success, pending, processing, error, shipped, delivered).

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with multiple status states
changelog.1.1.0: Moved to status category for better organization
changelog.1.1.1: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.1.2: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.2.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
